title: Resolve Muzi R1/R1 Neo public schematic and board-revision gaps
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-ev5b.1 confirmed useful firmware sources but no official public schematic or board revision matrix for original R1/R1 Neo was found. What needs to be done: obtain vendor schematic/revision data or document that the Zephyr target is based on Meshtastic/MeshCore firmware pin metadata plus hardware smoke tests. Acceptance criteria: source of truth is recorded; any revision-specific pin or power differences have child Beads before hardware bring-up proceeds.
